items.name: announcement
items.title: announcement
items.description: A compound badge designed to display an announcement.
items.author: Hayden Bleasel <hello@haydenbleasel.com>

items.name: avatar-stack
items.title: avatar-stack
items.description: Avatar Stack is a component that allows you to stack and overlap avatars.
items.author: Hayden Bleasel <hello@haydenbleasel.com>

items.name: banner
items.title: banner
items.description: A banner is a full-width component that can be used to show a message and action to the user.
items.author: Hayden Bleasel <hello@haydenbleasel.com>

items.name: calendar
items.title: calendar
items.description: The calendar view displays features on a grid calendar. Specifically it shows the end date of each feature, and groups features by day.
items.author: Hayden Bleasel <hello@haydenbleasel.com>

items.name: choicebox
items.title: choicebox
items.description: Choiceboxes are a great way to show radio or checkbox options with a card style.
items.author: Hayden Bleasel <hello@haydenbleasel.com>

items.name: code-block
items.title: code-block
items.description: Provides syntax highlighting, line numbers, and copy to clipboard functionality for code blocks.
items.author: Hayden Bleasel <hello@haydenbleasel.com>

items.name: color-picker
items.title: color-picker
items.description: Allows users to select a color. Modeled after the color picker in Figma.
items.author: Hayden Bleasel <hello@haydenbleasel.com>

items.name: combobox
items.title: combobox
items.description: Autocomplete input and command palette with a list of suggestions.
items.author: Hayden Bleasel <hello@haydenbleasel.com>

items.name: comparison
items.title: comparison
items.description: A slider-based component for comparing two items in an overlay.
items.author: Hayden Bleasel <hello@haydenbleasel.com>

items.name: contribution-graph
items.title: contribution-graph
items.description: A GitHub-style contribution graph component that displays activity levels over time.
items.author: Hayden Bleasel <hello@haydenbleasel.com>

items.name: credit-card
items.title: credit-card
items.description: Credit card components for displaying and validating credit card information.
items.author: Hayden Bleasel <hello@haydenbleasel.com>

items.name: cursor
items.title: cursor
items.description: A cursor component, great for realtime interactive applications.
items.author: Hayden Bleasel <hello@haydenbleasel.com>

items.name: deck
items.title: deck
items.description: A Tinder-like swipeable card stack component with smooth animations.
items.author: Hayden Bleasel <hello@haydenbleasel.com>

items.name: dialog-stack
items.title: dialog-stack
items.description: Composable stacked dialogs, useful for creating a wizard, nested form or multi-step process. It provides a consistent layout and styling for each dialog, and includes navigation component.
items.author: Hayden Bleasel <hello@haydenbleasel.com>

items.name: dropzone
items.title: dropzone
items.description: Allows users to drag-and-drop files into a container to upload or process them.
items.author: Hayden Bleasel <hello@haydenbleasel.com>

items.name: editor
items.title: editor
items.description: The Editor component is a powerful and flexible text editor that allows you to create and edit rich text content.
items.author: Hayden Bleasel <hello@haydenbleasel.com>

items.name: gantt
items.title: gantt
items.description: The Gantt chart is a powerful tool for visualizing project schedules and tracking the progress of tasks. It provides a clear, hierarchical view of tasks, allowing you to easily identify manage project timelines.
items.author: Hayden Bleasel <hello@haydenbleasel.com>

items.name: glimpse
items.title: glimpse
items.description: A component that shows a preview of a URL when hovering over a link.
items.author: Hayden Bleasel <hello@haydenbleasel.com>

items.name: image-crop
items.title: image-crop
items.description: Helps you crop images to a specific size or aspect ratio.
items.author: Hayden Bleasel <hello@haydenbleasel.com>

items.name: image-zoom
items.title: image-zoom
items.description: Image zoom is a component that allows you to zoom in on an image.
items.author: Hayden Bleasel <hello@haydenbleasel.com>

items.name: kanban
items.title: kanban
items.description: A kanban board is a visual tool that helps you manage and visualize your work. It is a board with columns, and each column represents a status, e.g. "Backlog", "In Progress", "Done".
items.author: Hayden Bleasel <hello@haydenbleasel.com>

items.name: list
items.title: list
items.description: List views are a great way to show a list of tasks grouped by status and ranked by priority.
items.author: Hayden Bleasel <hello@haydenbleasel.com>

items.name: marquee
items.title: marquee
items.description: Marquees are a great way to show a list of items in a horizontal scrolling motion.
items.author: Hayden Bleasel <hello@haydenbleasel.com>

items.name: mini-calendar
items.title: mini-calendar
items.description: A composable mini calendar component for picking dates close to today.
items.author: Hayden Bleasel <hello@haydenbleasel.com>

items.name: pill
items.title: pill
items.description: A flexible badge component designed for a variety of use cases.
items.author: Hayden Bleasel <hello@haydenbleasel.com>

items.name: qr-code
items.title: qr-code
items.description: QR Code is a component that generates a QR code from a string.
items.author: Hayden Bleasel <hello@haydenbleasel.com>

items.name: rating
items.title: rating
items.description: A star rating component with keyboard navigation and hover effects.
items.author: Hayden Bleasel <hello@haydenbleasel.com>

items.name: reel
items.title: reel
items.description: A composable Reel component that looks like Instagram Stories - a full-height, 9:16 aspect ratio container with video playback and progress indicators.
items.author: Hayden Bleasel <hello@haydenbleasel.com>

items.name: relative-time
items.title: relative-time
items.description: A component that displays time in various timezones.
items.author: Hayden Bleasel <hello@haydenbleasel.com>

items.name: sandbox
items.title: sandbox
items.description: The sandbox component allows you to preview and test components in a sandboxed environment.
items.author: Hayden Bleasel <hello@haydenbleasel.com>

items.name: snippet
items.title: snippet
items.description: Snippet is a component that allows you to display and copy code in a tabbed interface.
items.author: Hayden Bleasel <hello@haydenbleasel.com>

items.name: spinner
items.title: spinner
items.description: A spinner is a visual indicator that shows progress or activity.
items.author: Hayden Bleasel <hello@haydenbleasel.com>

items.name: status
items.title: status
items.description: Status components are used to display the uptime of a service.
items.author: Hayden Bleasel <hello@haydenbleasel.com>

items.name: stories
items.title: stories
items.description: A composable Stories component - a carousel of individual video cards like you'd see on Facebook.
items.author: Hayden Bleasel <hello@haydenbleasel.com>

items.name: table
items.title: table
items.description: Table views are used to display data in a tabular format. They are useful for displaying large amounts of data in a structured way.
items.author: Hayden Bleasel <hello@haydenbleasel.com>

items.name: tags
items.title: tags
items.description: Tags are a way to apply multiple labels to an item.
items.author: Hayden Bleasel <hello@haydenbleasel.com>

items.name: theme-switcher
items.title: theme-switcher
items.description: A component to switch between light, dark and system theme.
items.author: Hayden Bleasel <hello@haydenbleasel.com>

items.name: ticker
items.title: ticker
items.description: A composable finance ticker for displaying symbols, prices and changes.
items.author: Hayden Bleasel <hello@haydenbleasel.com>

items.name: tree
items.title: tree
items.description: A composable tree component with animated expand/collapse and customizable nodes.
items.author: Hayden Bleasel <hello@haydenbleasel.com>

items.name: typography
items.title: typography
items.description: A typography component designed to display text with a consistent style.
items.author: Hayden Bleasel <hello@haydenbleasel.com>

items.name: video-player
items.title: video-player
items.description: A composable, shadcn/ui styled video player component that uses the media-chrome library.
items.author: Hayden Bleasel <hello@haydenbleasel.com>
